claim: The framework CLAUDE.md compiles from the beliefs listed in this contract's render_sections. The file is read-only and regenerated from the cb: graph by `mix cb.generate.claude_md`. Authoring happens by creating beliefs (via /assert) and by editing this contract's render_sections; hand-edits to CLAUDE.md are overwritten on the next generation.

rules.header_comment:
<!-- Generated by mix cb.generate.claude_md from the cb: DAG. Do not edit; run the task to regenerate. -->

# Composable Beliefs

A framework for giving AI agents persistent, source-grounded, inspectable reasoning that survives session boundaries and composes into understanding the agent never explicitly derived.

invariants: CLAUDE.md is read-only - edits are overwritten on next generation
Every line of output traces to exactly one belief's claim field
deps equals the union of all beliefs referenced in render_sections
Section titles are human-readable; tags remain free for cross-cutting audit queries

evidence.detail: Single change from cb:c062: the Skills section renders cb:a524 (the five-skill list including /position) in place of the superseded cb:a521; deps updated to match per the union invariant. All other sections, rules, and invariants carried verbatim. The chain is c060 -> c061 -> c062 -> this node.
